metadata.title: Invoice Number Generator for Excel - INV-2026-0001 Series
metadata.description: Generate invoice number sequences for Excel, such as INV-2026-0001, with formulas, padding, TXT output, and CSV previews.

hero.title: Invoice number generator for Excel
hero.description: Create invoice, receipt, order, and document number sequences with predictable prefixes and padded numbers.

announcement.title: For invoice lists, order exports, and bookkeeping prep

intent.title: Generate document numbers without retyping the pattern
intent.description: Invoice numbers need consistent prefixes, separators, and padding. Build the pattern once, then paste it into Excel or export fixed values.

items.title: Flexible prefixes
items.description: Use INV-2026, ORDER, BILL, RCPT, or any short document prefix.

items.title: Padded numbering
items.description: Create INV-2026-0001 style numbers that stay sorted and readable.

items.title: Spreadsheet-safe output
items.description: Copy formulas for Excel ranges or download TXT when another workflow needs fixed values.

workflow.title: How to create invoice numbers in Excel
workflow.description: Use the generator to avoid hand-building long invoice number lists.

items.title: Choose a document prefix
items.description: For example, use INV-2026 as the prefix and a hyphen separator.

items.title: Set the starting number
items.description: Start at the next invoice number in your current sequence.

items.title: Copy the best output
items.description: Use formulas for Excel sheets and TXT or CSV when importing into another system.

related.title: Related numbering pages
related.description: Choose the page that matches your numbering job.

items.title: SKU sequences
items.description: For SKU-0001 product and catalog labels.

items.title: Account labels
items.description: For Account1 and account ID sequences.

items.title: Bulk row labels
items.description: For tickets, batches, rows, and general list labels.

items.question: Can I generate INV-2026-0001 style numbers?
items.answer: Yes. Use INV-2026 as the prefix, a hyphen separator, start at 1, and set zero padding to 4.

items.question: Can I start from an existing invoice number?
items.answer: Yes. Set the start number to the next number you need, such as 1284.

items.question: Is this a bookkeeping system?
items.answer: No. It only generates spreadsheet number sequences. Keep your official invoice records in your accounting system.

cta.title: Generate invoice numbers now
cta.description: Open the generator, enter your invoice pattern, and copy the output back to Excel.
